title: Coinbase Order
description: A trading order on the Coinbase platform, applicable across Advanced Trade, Exchange, and Prime APIs. Represents a request to buy or sell a cryptocurrency at a specified price and quantity.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the order assigned by Coinbase

client_order_id.description: Client-specified unique identifier for the order

product_id.description: Trading pair identifier such as BTC-USD

side.description: Whether this is a buy or sell order

order_type.description: Type of order determining execution behavior

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the order

time_in_force.description: Time-in-force policy governing how long the order remains active

base_size.description: Quantity of base currency to trade

quote_size.description: Quantity of quote currency to spend or receive

limit_price.description: Limit price for limit and stop-limit orders

stop_price.description: Trigger price for stop and stop-limit orders

filled_size.description: Amount that has been filled so far

filled_value.description: Total value of filled portion in quote currency

total_fees.description: Total fees charged for the order

number_of_fills.description: Number of individual fills for the order

completion_percentage.description: Percentage of the order that has been filled

portfolio_id.description: Portfolio that owns the order (Prime and Advanced Trade)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was completed

expiry_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order expires

post_only.description: Whether the order is post-only (maker only)

Fill.description: An individual fill representing partial or full execution of an order

liquidity.description: Whether the fill was maker or taker
